config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. In my view, society is strongest when individual rights are protected first, because that is what prevents power from being abused in the name of the common good. As someone from Indonesia, I value community and harmony, but I also know how easily “society’s interests” can be used to silence dissent or justify unfair treatment. A healthy society should serve people, not override their basic rights.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu mengalahkan hak individu, karena dari sudut pandang saya di Amerika Serikat, itu terlalu mudah dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Hak individu memang tidak absolut dalam setiap situasi, tetapi harus menjadi batas utama agar mayoritas atau negara tidak semena-mena atas nama “kebaikan bersama.” Yang paling masuk akal bagi saya adalah keseimbangan yang ketat: masyarakat boleh membatasi hak hanya bila benar-benar perlu, sempit, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Tanpa perlindungan kuat terhadap individu, “kepentingan masyarakat” sering berubah menjadi alasan untuk menekan orang yang lemah atau tidak populer.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not take priority over individual rights as a general rule. From my Indonesian perspective, I understand the appeal of prioritizing harmony and the common good, but I have also seen how easily that language can be used to pressure minorities, silence criticism, or excuse unfair treatment. Society does matter, yet its legitimate interests should be pursued only within clear limits that protect basic rights, because once those rights are weakened, the “common good” can become a tool for the powerful.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu secara umum. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kami cukup jelas menunjukkan bahwa ketika negara atau mayoritas diberi terlalu banyak ruang atas nama “kepentingan bersama,” hasilnya sering berupa penyalahgunaan kekuasaan dan penindasan terhadap kelompok yang tidak populer. Kepentingan masyarakat memang nyata, tetapi menurut saya itu harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar yang tidak boleh dikorbankan begitu saja. Kalau batas itu hilang, istilah “untuk masyarakat” terlalu mudah dipakai sebagai alasan untuk memaksa orang diam atau tunduk.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not take priority over the rights of the individual as a general principle. From my Indonesian perspective, I understand why people emphasize harmony, order, and the common good, but I have seen how quickly those ideas can be used to pressure minorities or silence criticism. A society is not truly healthy if it protects “the many” by sacrificing the basic rights of the vulnerable. The right balance is that society can pursue shared goals, but only within strict limits that keep individual rights secure.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu sebagai prinsip umum, karena dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, memberi prioritas otomatis pada kepentingan masyarakat terlalu mudah berubah menjadi pembenaran bagi negara atau mayoritas untuk melanggar hak orang yang tidak populer. Saya paham argumen tentang harmoni dan tujuan bersama, tetapi pengalaman politik di Amerika menunjukkan bahwa hak individu justru dibutuhkan sebagai rem agar kekuasaan tidak melampaui batas. Kepentingan masyarakat memang penting, namun harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar yang tidak boleh dikorbankan seenaknya. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling cepat menuntut kepatuhan, melainkan yang paling disiplin melindungi kebebasan orang-orangnya.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
